LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ATEL FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 27, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ATEL FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. EVEN IF THE COURT ASSUMES THAT SERVICE WAS PROPER, DEFENDANT HAS JUST CAUSE FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473.5 BECAUSE MR. MORAIS DECLARES AT PARAGRAPH 9 OF HIS DECLARATION THAT DEFENDANT LACKED ACTUAL KNOWLEDGE OF THE SUIT PRIOR TO THE ENTRY OF DEFAULT. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AND SERVE AN ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 20 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Continued To Jun-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT ATEL FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. Even if the Court assumes that service was proper, Defendant has just cause for relief under CCP 473.5 because Mr. Morais declares at paragraph 9 of his declaration that defendant lacked actual knowledge of the suit prior to the entry of default. Defendant may file and serve an answer to the Complaint within 20 days after entry of this order. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Sep-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ATEL FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to September 3, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 27, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
